papers.title: DSIRM: Learning Query-Bridged Discrete Semantic Identifiers for E-commerce Relevance Modeling
papers.authors: Bokang Wang, Xing Fang, Mingmin Jin, Jing Wang, Zhentao Song, Guangxin Song, Jianbo Zhu
papers.score_reason_zh: 方法把“离散语义ID”从生成式检索目标重新定位为排序特征，并用Query-bridged对比量化+LLM生成SID解决无监督聚类不受控的问题；同时给出离线+在线收益与可落地的低延迟混合架构，因此综合评分高。
papers.score_reason_en: It repositions discrete semantic IDs as ranking features and introduces query-bridged contrastive quantization plus LLM-based SID prediction to address uncontrolled unsupervised clustering, with both offline/online gains and a latency-friendly hybrid serving design.
papers.method_zh: 连续向量在电商标题同质化下难以做细粒度属性区分，且排序强依赖Query。本文先在Item侧用RQ-VAE做残差量化，但用Query-Item对作为监督引入InfoNCE，让量化码本学习“相关性驱动”的语义分区，得到层级SID。Query侧再用自回归LLM从文本预测Item的SID以覆盖尾部Query/歧义意图。最终用SID的层级前缀匹配特征与Dense向量特征一起输入排序网络。
papers.method_en: Dense embeddings struggle with fine-grained attribute distinctions in homogeneous e-commerce titles and query-dependent ranking. On the item side, the paper learns hierarchical SIDs via residual quantization (RQ-VAE) supervised by query-item InfoNCE (query-bridged contrastive quantization). On the query side, an autoregressive LLM predicts item SIDs from query text to handle tail/ambiguous queries. Ranking uses hierarchical prefix-matching features of query/item SIDs together with dense signals.
papers.innovation_zh: 1) 用Query-bridged监督把量化从“无监督聚类”改造成“相关性可控的离散分区”。2) 用LLM显式生成Query→SID，解决尾部Query与意图歧义。3) 把SID作为结构化离散特征融入排序而非仅用于生成式召回。
papers.innovation_en: (1) Turns quantization into relevance-controlled discrete partitioning via query-bridged supervision. (2) Uses LLM SID prediction to cover tail/ambiguous queries. (3) Treats SIDs as structured ranking features rather than only generative retrieval targets.
papers.metrics_zh: Tmall生产数据：离线AUC提升 +1.54%；在线A/B：UCTR +0.13%，UCTCVR +0.25%。混合架构：约88%流量命中离线Query缓存；在线推理服务平均RT 17.9ms、P99 24.3ms。
papers.metrics_en: On Tmall production data: +1.54% offline AUC; online A/B: +0.13% UCTR and +0.25% UCTCVR. Hybrid serving: ~88% traffic hits offline query cache; online inference RT 17.9ms avg / 24.3ms P99.

papers.title: Bridging Short Videos and Live Streams: Reasoning-Guided Multimodal LLMs for Cross-Domain Representation Learning
papers.authors: Le Zhang, Xiaolan Zhu, Yuchen Wang, Shilong Kang, Jiaqi Xue, Xiaoyu Zhang, Xiang Chen, Yalong Guan, Xiangyu Wu, Shijun Wang, Lantao Hu, Kun Gai
papers.affiliations: Kuaishou (paper mentions deployment in Kuaishou live streaming recommendation)
papers.score_reason_zh: 聚焦短视频→直播的冷启动迁移，场景与内容生态强相关；方法把MLLM推理知识蒸馏到轻量学生并做可迁移/残差分解，工程可落地。但公开信息中实验细节与量化指标披露有限，暂未到80+。
papers.score_reason_en: Highly relevant to short-video to live-stream cold-start transfer. It distills MLLM reasoning into a lightweight student and decomposes representations into transferable vs residual parts, making deployment practical. However, the publicly visible summary provides limited quantitative details, so the score stays below 80.
papers.method_zh: 短视频流量大但直播行为稀疏，导致直播推荐冷启动严重。RGCD-Rep先让冻结的教师MLLM生成结构化跨域推理知识，再通过蒸馏训练轻量学生MLLM，使“推理知识”可离线提取。随后把Item表示分解为可迁移表示与域残差表示，用行为协同信号引导跨域对齐。最终离线计算表示并接入下游召回/排序以控制成本。
papers.method_en: Live-stream recommendation suffers from sparse behavior signals while short videos provide rich supervision. RGCD-Rep first uses a frozen teacher MLLM to produce structured cross-domain reasoning and distills it into a lightweight student. Then it learns item representations decomposed into transferable and domain-residual components guided by behavioral collaboration signals. Representations are computed offline and plugged into downstream retrieval/ranking for low-cost deployment.
papers.innovation_zh: 1) 把MLLM“推理产物”当作可蒸馏的监督信号，做资源友好引入。2) 可迁移/域残差分解把跨域共享与域特有因素显式拆开。3) 强调离线计算、在线轻量接入的工程路径。
papers.innovation_en: (1) Treats MLLM reasoning outputs as distillable supervision. (2) Explicit transferable vs domain-residual decomposition for cross-domain learning. (3) Offline representation computation for production-friendly deployment.
papers.metrics_zh: 论文摘要：离线实验优于基线；在快手直播推荐系统上线A/B带来多项核心指标提升（摘要未给出具体数值）。
papers.metrics_en: Per abstract: consistently better offline results and positive online A/B gains in Kuaishou live-stream recommendation (no concrete numbers in abstract).

papers.title: SAILRec: Steering LLM Attention to Dual-Side Semantically Aligned Collaborative Embeddings for Recommendation
papers.authors: Xi Wu, Jiale Wang, Zihan Wang, Yichen Gao, Xiaocui Yang, Shi Feng, Daling Wang, Yifei Zhang
papers.score_reason_zh: 对“LLM注入协同Embedding但不会用”的痛点给出诊断+机制性解决：双侧语义对齐+分层注意力引导，并通过masking做因果式验证；实验较扎实。但整体仍是LLM推荐范式演进，SOTA/落地成本信息不充分，评分略低于80。
papers.score_reason_en: It diagnoses the under-utilization of injected collaborative embeddings and proposes dual-side semantic alignment plus hierarchical attention steering, validated with masking interventions. Strong experimental analysis, but limited evidence on production cost or broad SOTA status keeps it below 80.
papers.method_zh: 现有LLM推荐把协同Embedding作为软token注入，但推理时常在浅层“过早干扰”或在深层“用不起来”。SAILRec先做双侧语义对齐：Item侧让协同Embedding对齐到Item文本语义，User侧对齐到码本式语义画像。再做分层注意力引导：抑制浅层协同干扰、在深层强化协同证据以完成偏好匹配。通过对注意力路径masking验证各token与各层对性能的贡献。
papers.method_en: LLM recommenders inject collaborative embeddings as soft tokens but may use them improperly across layers. SAILRec applies dual-side semantic alignment: item-side embeddings aligned to item-text semantics and user-side embeddings aligned to codebook-based semantic profiles. It then steers attention hierarchically: suppress collaborative interference in shallow layers and strengthen collaborative evidence in deep layers. Masking attention paths provides interventional evidence of token/layer contributions.
papers.innovation_zh: 1) 用注意力诊断揭示“深度依赖+对齐敏感”的协同利用规律。2) 双侧语义对齐把user/item协同信号都拉到LLM可理解空间。3) 分层注意力引导把“什么时候用协同”显式机制化，并用masking强化证据链。
papers.innovation_en: (1) Attention-based diagnosis of depth-dependent and alignment-sensitive collaborative usage. (2) Dual-side alignment for both user and item collaborative signals. (3) Explicit hierarchical steering of when to use collaborative evidence, validated via masking.
papers.metrics_zh: MovieLens-1M / Amazon-Book：Full-SAILRec（Qwen3-8B）达到 AUC 0.7398 / 0.8359，NDCG 0.8861 / 0.8986（对应UAUC、MAP亦优于对照）。
papers.metrics_en: On MovieLens-1M / Amazon-Book, Full-SAILRec (Qwen3-8B) achieves AUC 0.7398 / 0.8359 and NDCG 0.8861 / 0.8986 (with consistent UAUC/MAP gains).

papers.title: Beyond Retrieval: Learning Compact User Representations for Scalable LLM Personalization
papers.authors: Heng Cao, Fan Zhang, Jian Yao, Yujie Zheng, Changlin Zhao, Lu Hao, Yuxuan Wei, Wangze Ni, Huaiyu Fu, Yuqian Sun, Xuyan Mo
papers.affiliations: Microsoft; Shanghai International Studies University; Zhejiang University; The Hong Kong Polytechnic University
papers.score_reason_zh: 把用户偏好建模成可学习前缀，避免RAG/PAG的检索敏感与每用户adapter的参数爆炸；在LaMP全任务上系统性优于多类基线，并给出消融与在线更新模拟，方法工程价值强。但与电商治理相关性偏“弱相关”，因此总分中等偏上。
papers.score_reason_en: It learns compact user preference representations as prefixes, avoiding retrieval sensitivity and per-user adapter explosion. It shows consistent gains on all LaMP tasks with ablations and simulated online adaptation, but the direct relevance to e-commerce governance is weaker.
papers.method_zh: 现有个性化LLM要么依赖RAG/PAG拼prompt（对检索与提示敏感），要么每用户维护LoRA/Adapter（不易规模化）。TAP-PER用“用户状态前缀Pu + query条件前缀Pq”把偏好表示成可学习向量，并用时间衰减建模兴趣变化。推理时把前缀注入共享backbone，不再显式拼接历史或存大量adapter。还支持只更新每用户小前缀做轻量在线适配。
papers.method_en: Personalization via RAG/PAG is retrieval/prompt sensitive, while per-user adapters do not scale. TAP-PER encodes preferences as learnable prefixes: a user-state prefix Pu and a query-conditioned prefix Pq with temporal signals. Prefixes are injected into a shared backbone at inference, removing explicit prompt construction and heavy per-user adapters. The compact per-user prefix can be updated online without retraining shared parameters.
papers.innovation_zh: 1) 用前缀向量“参数化地替代”RAG/PAG式prompt个性化。2) 用户状态/Query条件拆分+时间衰减，让偏好表达更像推荐系统的user modeling。3) 以32K量级参数做每用户在线更新，兼顾效果与规模。
papers.innovation_en: (1) Prefix representations as parameterized counterparts of prompt-based personalization. (2) Decomposed user-state vs query-conditioned modeling with temporal decay. (3) Lightweight per-user state (~32K scalars) enabling online updates at scale.
papers.metrics_zh: LaMP基准：在6个任务的所有指标上均最好；相比最优OPPU变体，LaMP-2M准确率提升 7.2 个点（0.679→0.751），LaMP-5 ROUGE-1 提升 2.8 个点（0.510→0.538）。存储：每用户参数比OPPU少 130×，1,000用户规模下总参数约为 PER-PCS 的一半。
papers.metrics_en: On LaMP, it achieves best performance across all task-metric pairs. vs best OPPU variant: +7.2 pts Acc on LaMP-2M (0.679→0.751) and +2.8 pts ROUGE-1 on LaMP-5 (0.510→0.538). Storage: 130× fewer per-user params than OPPU and ~half total footprint of PER-PCS at 1,000 users.

papers.title: Trading Engagement for Sustainability: Carbon-Aware Re-ranking for E-commerce Recommendations
papers.authors: Anders Vestrum, Jørgen Bergh, Noah Lund Syrdal
papers.score_reason_zh: 问题定义贴近电商且有可操作的λ控制，但核心是“估计PCF + 后处理重排”的组合，方法创新度有限；实验以离线为主，缺少真实线上验证。不过论文给出清晰的trade-off分析与开源代码，值得关注。
papers.score_reason_en: It addresses a highly practical e-commerce problem with a tunable trade-off parameter, but the core approach (PCF estimation + post-hoc re-ranking) is relatively incremental and evaluation is mainly offline. Still, the Pareto analysis is solid and code is available.
papers.method_zh: 由于大规模商品缺少碳足迹标签，论文先用“语义相似检索 + few-shot LLM提示 + 近邻兜底”把小规模Carbon Catalogue的监督迁移到大目录，估计每个商品的PCF。然后在任意基础推荐模型（BPR/NeuMF/LightGCN）的相关性分上做后处理重排，用λ在“预测互动/点击”与“碳足迹”之间做线性权衡。通过扫λ得到各品类/模型的Pareto前沿以指导运营落点。
papers.method_en: Since PCF labels are missing at catalog scale, it estimates product PCF via semantic similarity retrieval, few-shot LLM prompting, and a nearest-neighbor fallback transferring supervision from the Carbon Catalogue. It then performs post-hoc re-ranking on top of baseline recommender scores (BPR/NeuMF/LightGCN), trading engagement vs carbon footprint with a single parameter λ. Sweeping λ yields Pareto frontiers across categories and models.
papers.innovation_zh: 1) 把可持续性信号引入推荐的“缺标签现实约束”，通过RAG+LLM补全PCF。2) 用统一λ把重排变成可解释、可调的业务旋钮，并用Pareto前沿系统化呈现代价。
papers.innovation_en: (1) Practical PCF completion with RAG + LLM under missing-label constraints. (2) A single interpretable λ knob with Pareto frontiers to quantify engagement–carbon trade-offs.
papers.metrics_zh: 在NDCG@10下降不超过5%的预算下：BPR/LightGCN通常可在3个品类上实现约70–86%的碳减排；NeuMF在Electronics品类仅能做到7.6%。Home & Kitchen最“碳灵活”：3个模型都能在5%预算内超过80%减排。
papers.metrics_en: Within a ≤5% NDCG@10 degradation budget: BPR/LightGCN typically achieve ~70–86% carbon reduction across categories; NeuMF in Electronics only 7.6%. Home & Kitchen is most carbon-flexible: all three models exceed 80% reduction within the 5% budget.

papers.title: Argus-Retriever: Vision-LLM Late-Interaction Retrieval with Region-Aware Query-Conditioned MoE for Visual Document Retrieval
papers.authors: Abdelrahman Abdallah, Mahmoud Abdalla, Mohammed Ali, Adam Jatowt
papers.score_reason_zh: 在视觉文档检索上做Query条件化late-interaction并引入区域MoE，指标很强且训练数据更省；对电商内容理解属于“弱相关（检索/RAG基础能力）”，因此总分未达80。
papers.score_reason_en: Strong query-conditioned late-interaction VLM retriever with region-aware MoE and strong leaderboard metrics, but only weakly related to e-commerce governance/content.
papers.method_zh: 传统ColPali/ColQwen等late-interaction方法对文档页编码不看Query，导致同一页面对不同问题无法自适应。Argus在Qwen3.5-VL上让Query编码器输出检索向量+上下文向量，把页面按空间区域池化后用Query驱动的router为每个区域选择MoE专家，再做MaxSim匹配，得到依赖Query的多向量索引D(q)。同时把检索head维度降到1024并减少监督数据用量以提升效率。
papers.method_en: Existing late-interaction VLM retrievers encode pages without seeing the query. Argus makes document representations query-dependent by adding a region-aware MoE: the query encoder outputs retrieval embeddings plus a context vector; the page is pooled into spatial regions and a query-aware router selects experts per region before MaxSim. The result stays ColPali-compatible as a multi-vector index D(q), with a smaller 1024-d retrieval head and reduced supervision.
papers.innovation_zh: 1) 把late-interaction从“Query-independent”升级为“Query-conditioned”的可索引形式。2) 区域粒度MoE把布局/区域信息显式纳入路由。3) 在更小head与更少监督下仍达SOTA，强调效率。
papers.innovation_en: (1) Query-conditioned, index-compatible late interaction. (2) Region-level MoE routing for layout-aware adaptation. (3) Strong efficiency: smaller head and less supervision with strong accuracy.
papers.metrics_zh: ViDoRe V1：NDCG@5=92.67；V1+V2综合榜：NDCG@5=86.0（开源late-interaction模型最高之一）。在Qwen3.6-27B agentic检索流水线中，ViDoRe V3的NDCG@10从60.28提升到64.80。
papers.metrics_en: ViDoRe V1: 92.67 NDCG@5; combined V1+V2: 86.0 NDCG@5 (top reported among open late-interaction models). In a Qwen3.6-27B agentic retrieval pipeline on ViDoRe V3, NDCG@10 improves from 60.28 to 64.80.

papers.title: When Seeing Is Not Believing—A Benchmark for Search-Grounded Video Misinformation Detection
papers.affiliations: CASIA; UCAS; BAAI; Tsinghua University; Peking University
papers.score_reason_zh: 内容生态治理强相关：把“仅看视频”提升到“检索+跨视频证据对比”的事实核验范式，并构建高质量难例基准；但更偏评测与问题刻画，方法侧更多是baseline与误差分析，因此创新与可复现工程落地分数中等偏上。
papers.score_reason_en: Highly relevant to content governance: it formalizes search-grounded verification and builds a hard benchmark. The work is mainly benchmark + baseline analysis rather than proposing a new SOTA model, so it scores mid-high.
papers.method_zh: 证据依赖型视频造假往往通过剪辑/重排/拼接/生成来扭曲叙事，仅凭输入视频无法发现“缺失或替换的证据”。EVID-Bench要求系统先上网检索相关视频，再通过跨视频对齐与对比找出哪里被篡改并给出解释。数据集包含222个视频、9类操控方式、覆盖AI生成/单源编辑/多源编辑，并保证前沿模型“只看视频”难以检测。作者给出检索增强的search-verify-reflect基线并做系统性误差分析。
papers.method_en: Evidence-dependent video misinformation cannot be verified from the input video alone because missing/replaced evidence is external. EVID-Bench requires systems to retrieve related videos from the web and perform cross-video comparison to identify what is false and explain it. The benchmark contains 222 videos across 9 manipulation types (AI generation, single-source editing, multi-source editing) and is filtered to be hard for frontier models via visual inspection alone. A retrieval-augmented verify baseline (search-verify-reflect) and error analysis are provided.
papers.innovation_zh: 1) 把视频治理问题定义为“检索驱动+对比推理”的联合能力评测。2) 通过人审+模型过滤构造“视觉不可判”的难例，贴近真实治理痛点。3) 细致的错误类型分析可直接指导检索策略与证据充分性判断。
papers.innovation_en: (1) Defines video misinformation detection as joint retrieval + contrastive reasoning. (2) Hard examples verified to be non-trivial by visual inspection alone. (3) Error taxonomy directly informs retrieval strategies and sufficiency criteria.
papers.metrics_zh: 数据集：222条视频，9种操控类型。9个前沿多模态模型评测：最佳系统点级准确率61.43%，视频级准确率43.24%，AI生成类最难。
papers.metrics_en: Dataset: 222 videos, 9 manipulation types. Evaluation on 9 frontier multimodal models: best system achieves 61.43% point-level accuracy and 43.24% video-level accuracy; AI-generated manipulations are hardest.

papers.title: MM-BizRAG: Rethinking Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation for General Purpose Enterprise Q&A
papers.authors: Hanoz Bhathena, Parin Rajesh Jhaveri, Rohan Mittal, Prateek Singh, Aymen Kallala, Rachneet Kaur, Yiqiao Jin, Zhen Zeng, Adwait Ratnaparkhi, Denis Kochedykov
papers.affiliations: ACL 2026 Industry Track (affiliation not fully shown in abstract page)
papers.score_reason_zh: 面向复杂企业文档的MM-RAG，强调结构感知切分与推理时组装，能迁移到电商内容理解/风控文档场景；且在公开基准提升大。但对电商达人治理属于“间接相关”，因此分数中等。
papers.score_reason_en: Strong multimodal RAG system for structured enterprise docs; applicable to e-commerce content understanding and policy QA, with large benchmark gains. Direct governance relevance is indirect, so the score is mid.
papers.method_zh: 当前MM-RAG常用整页图片做embedding与生成，容易忽略企业文档中的结构信息。MM-BizRAG先做结构感知切分：按页面方向把文档路由到“竖向布局解析（报告）/横向整页表示（PPT）”两条摄取管线。再用LLM驱动的artifact变换与占位符位置对齐保持阅读顺序，并在推理时把“检索表征”与“生成上下文”解耦组装，以减少幻觉、提升 groundedness。
papers.method_en: MM-RAG often relies on page images and implicit structure. MM-BizRAG explicitly extracts structure via a document-orientation-aware split: vertical-layout docs (reports) go through layout-aware parsing, while horizontal-layout docs (slides) use holistic page-level representations. An LLM-driven artifact transformation with placeholder-based positional alignment preserves reading order. Inference-time multimodal assembly decouples retrieval representations from generation context for more grounded answers.
papers.innovation_zh: 1) 结构感知、方向路由的双摄取管线，显式处理企业文档布局。2) 占位符对齐把多模态片段组装成“可读顺序”的上下文。3) FastRAGEval单次LLM Judge度量，降低评测成本并更贴合人评。
papers.innovation_en: (1) Structure-aware, orientation-routed ingestion pipelines. (2) Placeholder-based alignment for faithful reading-order context construction. (3) FastRAGEval: single-call LLM-judge metric to reduce evaluation cost with better human alignment.
papers.metrics_zh: 在企业数据集与公开基准SlideVQA、FinRAGBench-V上，相对vision-centric基线最高提升32个百分点；FastRAGEval将RAGChecker评测成本减半且人类一致性更强。
papers.metrics_en: On a large enterprise dataset and public benchmarks (SlideVQA, FinRAGBench-V), it beats vision-centric baselines by up to 32 points. FastRAGEval halves RAGChecker cost while improving human alignment.

papers.title: Can Generalist Agents Automate Data Curation?
papers.authors: Feiyang Kang, Hanze Li, Adam Nguyen, Mahavir Dabas, Jiaqi W. Ma, Frederic Sala, Dawn Song, Ruoxi Jia
papers.score_reason_zh: 电商治理强相关（数据质量/打标/清洗自动化）：提出可复现的agent数据策展闭环基准并分析“执行-研究鸿沟”，还给出脚手架让agent做方法迁移并在更低数据预算下超过强基线；但更多是基准与发现，方法创新相对有限。
papers.score_reason_en: Relevant to governance data quality: introduces an agent-centric data curation benchmark and studies the execution–research gap, showing scaffolds can yield better policies under smaller data budgets. It is more benchmark/insight than a new model, so mid-high.
papers.method_zh: 作者把“数据策展”定义为一个可交互的迭代闭环：提出/实现数据策略→跑固定训练评测→根据反馈改进。Curation-Bench固定模型/训练配方/评测套件，但给通用coding agent命令行访问数据与流水线，让其自动迭代。发现默认agent容易只做局部调参而不探索新方法族（执行-研究鸿沟），于是加入“每轮必须引用并改造已有方法”的脚手架，推动agent做方法指导的探索。
papers.method_en: Curation-Bench frames data curation as an iterative loop: propose/implement data policies, run a fixed training+eval pipeline, and revise based on feedback. The benchmark fixes model/recipe/evals but grants coding agents CLI access to inspect data and implement policies. Analysis shows an execution–research gap: agents over-focus on local variants instead of exploring new policy families. A scaffold requiring cite-and-adapt of prior methods shifts agents toward method-guided exploration.
papers.innovation_zh: 1) 把数据质量策略搜索做成agent可操作的标准化闭环评测。2) 提出“执行-研究鸿沟”诊断并用引用/迁移脚手架改善探索行为。3) 对自动化数据治理/打标策略编排具有直接启发。
papers.innovation_en: (1) Standardizes the data-policy iteration loop as an agent benchmark. (2) Identifies the execution–research gap and mitigates it with cite-and-adapt scaffolds. (3) Practical implications for automated data governance and curation.
papers.metrics_zh: VLM指令微调设置下：开箱agent在10次迭代内即可达到强数据选择基线；加入“方法引用+改造”脚手架后，agent能在仅用十分之一数据预算的情况下超过强公开基线（摘要未给出具体数值）。
papers.metrics_en: In a vision-language instruction-tuning instantiation: out-of-the-box agents reach strong published data-selection baselines within 10 iterations; with cite-and-adapt scaffolds, the agent discovers a policy beating strong baselines at one-tenth the data budget (no exact numbers in abstract).

papers.title: Distributional Approximate Nearest Neighbour Search for Uncertainty-Aware Retrieval
papers.score_reason_zh: 提出把embedding不确定性纳入ANN召回的简单方法，直接针对长尾覆盖与多样性，工程侵入性低；但更偏理论/基础设施层，缺少明确的业务收益指标与对电商治理的直接链路，所以分数略低。
papers.score_reason_en: A simple infra-compatible way to incorporate embedding uncertainty into ANN retrieval for better long-tail coverage, but limited direct governance linkage and fewer concrete business metrics keep the score lower.
papers.method_zh: 传统ANN只索引每个item的点估计embedding，稀疏交互下不确定性会让长尾item被系统性低估。DINOSAUR为每个item采样Si个embedding并建立扩展索引，Query侧也对user embedding采样，从而在召回时隐式对不确定性做边际化。该方案不改模型结构也不改ANN基础设施，只是“把一个点”变成“一个分布的采样集合”。
papers.method_en: Standard ANN indexes point-estimate embeddings, which biases retrieval toward popular head items when embeddings are uncertain under sparse data. DINOSAUR samples multiple embeddings per item to build an augmented index, and samples user embeddings at query time. This stochastic retrieval implicitly marginalizes over uncertainty without changing model architecture or ANN infrastructure—turning points into sampled distributions.
papers.innovation_zh: 1) 用采样方式把不确定性注入召回，不破坏现有索引系统。2) 分析不确定性如何扩大“可被召回”的潜在空间，从机制上解释长尾覆盖提升。
papers.innovation_en: (1) Sampling-based uncertainty injection that remains compatible with existing ANN infrastructure. (2) Analytical characterization of how variance expands retrievable regions, explaining long-tail coverage gains.
papers.metrics_zh: 摘要：在仅带来小幅离线Recall损失的情况下，显著提升候选覆盖（coverage）与长尾可见性（未给出具体数值）。
papers.metrics_en: Per abstract: large coverage gains with small offline recall losses (no concrete numbers in abstract).
